creator: erich@tacni.net
text:
--- /usr/ports/net/gabber.orig/Makefile Wed Jul 19 02:32:05 2000
 +++ /usr/ports/net/gabber/Makefile      Tue Aug  1 00:33:59 2000
 @@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
  #
  
  PORTNAME=      gabber
 -PORTVERSION=   0.6.1
 +PORTVERSION=   0.7.0
  CATEGORIES=    net
  MASTER_SITES=  ${MASTER_SITE_SOURCEFORGE}
  MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=    ${PORTNAME}
 diff -ruN /usr/ports/net/gabber.orig/files/md5 /usr/ports/net/gabber/files/md5
 --- /usr/ports/net/gabber.orig/files/md5        Fri Jun 30 09:34:13 2000
 +++ /usr/ports/net/gabber/files/md5     Tue Aug  1 00:34:55 2000
 @@ -1 +1 @@
 -MD5 (gabber-0.6.1.tar.gz) = 423c62683083c0e8d89d11448cd9e9a4
 +MD5 (gabber-0.7.0.tar.gz) = 0446b9692de1203515bf3c498c1eb899
 diff -ruN /usr/ports/net/gabber.orig/patches/patch-aa /usr/ports/net/gabber/patc
 hes/patch-aa
 --- /usr/ports/net/gabber.orig/patches/patch-aa Fri Jun 30 09:34:14 2000
 +++ /usr/ports/net/gabber/patches/patch-aa      Tue Aug  1 01:23:23 2000
 @@ -1,11 +1,20 @@
 ---- jabberoo/src/sha.c.orig    Wed Jun 21 22:38:30 2000
 -+++ jabberoo/src/sha.c Wed Jun 21 22:39:14 2000
 -@@ -45,7 +45,7 @@
 - #include <sys/stat.h>
 - #ifndef WIN32
 - #include <unistd.h>
 --#include <endian.h>
 -+#include <machine/endian.h>
 - #define INT64 long long
 - #else
 - #include <string.h>
 +--- configure.orig     Tue Aug  1 00:44:24 2000
 ++++ configure  Tue Aug  1 01:04:28 2000
 +@@ -4276,7 +4276,7 @@
 +   cat conftest.$ac_ext >&5
 +   rm -rf conftest*
 +   CATOBJEXT=.mo
 +-                 DATADIRNAME=lib
 ++                 DATADIRNAME=share
 + fi
 + rm -f conftest*
 +               INSTOBJEXT=.mo
 +@@ -4538,7 +4538,7 @@
 +                USE_INCLUDED_LIBINTL=yes
 +                CATOBJEXT=.cat
 +                INSTOBJEXT=.cat
 +-               DATADIRNAME=lib
 ++               DATADIRNAME=share
 +                INTLDEPS='$(top_builddir)/intl/libintl.a'
 +                INTLLIBS=$INTLDEPS
 +                LIBS=`echo $LIBS | sed -e 's/-lintl//'`
 diff -ruN /usr/ports/net/gabber.orig/patches/patch-ab /usr/ports/net/gabber/patc
 hes/patch-ab
 --- /usr/ports/net/gabber.orig/patches/patch-ab Fri Jun 30 09:34:14 2000
 +++ /usr/ports/net/gabber/patches/patch-ab      Tue Aug  1 01:17:35 2000
 @@ -1,6 +1,7 @@
 ---- jabberoo/Makefile.am.orig  Thu Jun 22 00:06:36 2000
 -+++ jabberoo/Makefile.am       Thu Jun 22 00:06:46 2000
 +--- jabberoo/Makefile.am.orig   Tue Aug  1 00:41:15 2000
 ++++ jabberoo/Makefile.am        Tue Aug  1 00:41:25 2000
  @@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
   EXTRA_DIST = include
 --SUBDIRS = src test 
 -+SUBDIRS = src
 +-SUBDIRS = expat src test 
 ++SUBDIRS = expat src 
 +
 diff -ruN /usr/ports/net/gabber.orig/patches/patch-ac /usr/ports/net/gabber/patc
 hes/patch-ac
 --- /usr/ports/net/gabber.orig/patches/patch-ac Fri Jun 30 09:34:14 2000
 +++ /usr/ports/net/gabber/patches/patch-ac      Tue Aug  1 01:27:09 2000
 @@ -1,11 +1,15 @@
 ---- src/Makefile.in.orig       Fri Jun 30 09:25:00 2000
 -+++ src/Makefile.in    Fri Jun 30 09:25:25 2000
 -@@ -141,7 +141,7 @@
 +--- pixmaps/Makefile.in.orig   Tue Aug  1 00:46:43 2000
 ++++ pixmaps/Makefile.in        Tue Aug  1 00:47:11 2000
 +@@ -137,10 +137,10 @@
 + EXTRA_DIST = gabber.png                               away.xpm                
                 chat.xpm                                dnd.xpm                 
                 offline.xpm                             online.xpm              
                 stalker.xpm                             xa.xpm                  
                 gnome-gabber.xpm                        gnome-message.xpm       
                 gnome-ooochat.xpm                       gnome-s10n.xpm          
                 glade-gabber-logo.png                   glade-message.xpm       
                 glade-ooochat.xpm                       glade-s10n.xpm          
                 glade-new-user.xpm                      glade-new-user-menu.xpm 
                 glade-edit-user.xpm                     glade-edit-user-menu.xpm
                 glade-delete-user.xpm                   glade-delete-user-menu.xpm              glade-users.xpm                         glade-sendasooo.xpm     
                 glade-noclose.xpm       
 + 
 + 
 +-logodir = $(datadir)/pixmaps
 ++logodir = $(datadir)/gnome/pixmaps
 + logo_DATA = gabber.png
 + 
 +-pixmapdir = $(datadir)/pixmaps/gabber
 ++pixmapdir = $(datadir)/gnome/pixmaps/gabber
 + pixmap_DATA = away.xpm                                        chat.xpm        
                         dnd.xpm                                 offline.xpm     
                         online.xpm                              stalker.xpm     
                         xa.xpm                                  gnome-gabber.xpm
                         gnome-message.xpm                       gnome-ooochat.xp
 m                       gnome-s10n.xpm
   
 - EXTRA_DIST = Gabber.hh GladeHelper.hh gabber.glade GabberGladeStrings.c Gabber
 Config.hh
   
 --CXXFLAGS = -g -O2
 -+CXXFLAGS = @CXXFLAGS@
 - mkinstalldirs = $(SHELL) $(top_srcdir)/mkinstalldirs
 - CONFIG_HEADER = ../config.h
 - CONFIG_CLEAN_FILES =  GabberConfig.hh
 diff -ruN /usr/ports/net/gabber.orig/patches/patch-ad /usr/ports/net/gabber/patc
 hes/patch-ad
 --- /usr/ports/net/gabber.orig/patches/patch-ad Fri Jun 30 09:34:14 2000
 +++ /usr/ports/net/gabber/patches/patch-ad      Fri Jun 30 09:34:14 2000
 @@ -1,11 +1,10 @@
 ---- configure.orig     Fri Jun 30 09:43:51 2000
 -+++ configure  Fri Jun 30 09:43:05 2000
 -@@ -3604,7 +3604,7 @@
 -   cat conftest.$ac_ext >&5
 -   rm -rf conftest*
 -   CATOBJEXT=.mo
 --                 DATADIRNAME=lib
 -+                 DATADIRNAME=share
 - fi
 - rm -f conftest*
 -               INSTOBJEXT=.mo
 +--- src/GabberConfig.hh.in.orig        Fri Jun 30 17:20:39 2000
 ++++ src/GabberConfig.hh.in     Fri Jun 30 17:21:45 2000
 +@@ -7,6 +7,6 @@
 + static const char* GABBER_VERSION   = VERSION;
 + static const char* GABBER_GLADEFILE = "@prefix@/share/gabber/gabber.glade";
 + static const char* GABBER_CONFIG    = "/Gabber/";
 +-static const char* GABBER_PIXPATH   = "@prefix@/share/pixmaps/gabber/";
 ++static const char* GABBER_PIXPATH   = "@prefix@/share/gnome/pixmaps/gabber/";
 + 
 +
 diff -ruN /usr/ports/net/gabber.orig/patches/patch-ae /usr/ports/net/gabber/patc
 hes/patch-ae
 --- /usr/ports/net/gabber.orig/patches/patch-ae Fri Jun 30 09:34:14 2000
 +++ /usr/ports/net/gabber/patches/patch-ae      Tue Aug  1 01:18:08 2000
 @@ -1,10 +1,12 @@
 ---- src/GabberConfig.hh.in.orig        Fri Jun 30 17:20:39 2000
 -+++ src/GabberConfig.hh.in     Fri Jun 30 17:21:45 2000
 -@@ -7,6 +7,6 @@
 - static const char* GABBER_VERSION   = VERSION;
 - static const char* GABBER_GLADEFILE = "@prefix@/share/gabber/gabber.glade";
 - static const char* GABBER_CONFIG    = "/Gabber/";
 --static const char* GABBER_PIXPATH   = "@prefix@/share/pixmaps/gabber/";
 -+static const char* GABBER_PIXPATH   = "@prefix@/share/gnome/pixmaps/gabber/";
 +--- src/Makefile.in.orig        Tue Aug  1 00:42:55 2000
 ++++ src/Makefile.in     Tue Aug  1 00:43:22 2000
 +@@ -148,7 +148,7 @@
   
 + EXTRA_DIST = Gabber.hh GladeHelper.hh gabber.glade GabberGladeStrings.c GabberConfig.hh
 + 
 +-CXXFLAGS = -g -O2
 ++CXXFLAGS = @CXXFLAGS@
 + mkinstalldirs = $(SHELL) $(top_srcdir)/mkinstalldirs
 + CONFIG_HEADER = ../config.h
 + CONFIG_CLEAN_FILES =  GabberConfig.hh
  
 diff -ruN /usr/ports/net/gabber.orig/patches/patch-af /usr/ports/net/gabber/patc
 hes/patch-af
 --- /usr/ports/net/gabber.orig/patches/patch-af Fri Jun 30 09:34:14 2000
 +++ /usr/ports/net/gabber/patches/patch-af      Tue Aug  1 01:18:18 2000
 @@ -1,15 +1,12 @@
 ---- pixmaps/Makefile.in.orig   Fri Jun 30 17:19:39 2000
 -+++ pixmaps/Makefile.in        Fri Jun 30 17:20:16 2000
 -@@ -130,10 +130,10 @@
 - EXTRA_DIST = gabber.png                               away.xpm                		chat.xpm                                dnd.xpm                 		offline.xpm                             online.xpm            			stalker.xpm                             x a.xpm                		 gnome-gabber.xpm                        gnome-message.xpm      	        	 gnome-ooochat.xpm                       gnome-s10n.xpm         		 glade-gabber-logo.png                   glade-message.xpm                       glade-oooc hat.xpm                       glade-s10n.xpm         		 glade-new-user.xpm                      glade-new-user-menu.xpm
 - 
 - 
 --logodir = $(datadir)/pixmaps
 -+logodir = $(datadir)/gnome/pixmaps
 - logo_DATA = gabber.png
 - 
 --pixmapdir = $(datadir)/pixmaps/gabber
 -+pixmapdir = $(datadir)/gnome/pixmaps/gabber
 - pixmap_DATA = away.xpm                                        chat.xpm       				 dnd.xpm                                offline.xpm    				 online.xpm                             stalker.xpm   				 xa.xpm                                 gnome-gabber.x pm			 gnome-message.xpm                     gnome-ooochat.xpm			gnome-s10n.xpm
 - 
 - 
 +--- jabberoo/src/sha.c.orig    Wed Jun 21 22:38:30 2000
 ++++ jabberoo/src/sha.c Wed Jun 21 22:39:14 2000
 +@@ -45,7 +45,7 @@
 + #include <sys/stat.h>
 + #ifndef WIN32
 + #include <unistd.h>
 +-#include <endian.h>
 ++#include <machine/endian.h>
 + #define INT64 long long
 + #else
 + #include <string.h>
 +
 diff -ruN /usr/ports/net/gabber.orig/pkg/PLIST /usr/ports/net/gabber/pkg/PLIST
 --- /usr/ports/net/gabber.orig/pkg/PLIST        Fri Jun 30 09:34:14 2000
 +++ /usr/ports/net/gabber/pkg/PLIST     Tue Aug  1 01:57:48 2000
 @@ -1,5 +1,5 @@
  bin/gabber
 -share/locale/en_SE/LC_MESSAGES/gabber.mo
 +lib/locale/en_SE/LC_MESSAGES/gabber.mo
  share/gabber/gabber.glade
  share/gabber/glade-gabber-logo.png
  share/gabber/glade-message.xpm
 @@ -7,6 +7,13 @@
  share/gabber/glade-s10n.xpm
  share/gabber/glade-new-user.xpm
  share/gabber/glade-new-user-menu.xpm
 +share/gabber/glade-edit-user.xpm
 +share/gabber/glade-edit-user-menu.xpm
 +share/gabber/glade-delete-user.xpm
 +share/gabber/glade-delete-user-menu.xpm
 +share/gabber/glade-users.xpm
 +share/gabber/glade-sendasooo.xpm
 +share/gabber/glade-noclose.xpm
  share/gnome/pixmaps/gabber.png
  share/gnome/pixmaps/gabber/away.xpm
  share/gnome/pixmaps/gabber/chat.xpm
 @@ -52,11 +59,6 @@
  share/gnome/help/gabber/C/agents-register.png
  share/gnome/help/gabber/C/first.png
  share/gnome/help/gabber/C/login.png
 -share/gnome/help/gabber/C/main-menubar-gabber.png
 -share/gnome/help/gabber/C/main-menubar-help.png
 -share/gnome/help/gabber/C/main-menubar-roster.png
 -share/gnome/help/gabber/C/main-menubar-user.png
 -share/gnome/help/gabber/C/main-roster-menu.png
  share/gnome/help/gabber/C/main-status-roster.png
  share/gnome/help/gabber/C/main-status-user-dialog.png
  share/gnome/help/gabber/C/main-status-user-show.png
 @@ -64,22 +66,14 @@
  share/gnome/help/gabber/C/main.png
  share/gnome/help/gabber/C/mainshot.png
  share/gnome/help/gabber/C/msg-gc-join.png
 -share/gnome/help/gabber/C/msg-gc-main-menubar-chat.png
 -share/gnome/help/gabber/C/msg-gc-main-menubar-edit.png
 -share/gnome/help/gabber/C/msg-gc-main-menubar-help.png
  share/gnome/help/gabber/C/msg-gc-main.png
 -share/gnome/help/gabber/C/msg-normal-advanced.png
  share/gnome/help/gabber/C/msg-normal-reply.png
  share/gnome/help/gabber/C/msg-normal.png
  share/gnome/help/gabber/C/msg-ooo.png
 -share/gnome/help/gabber/C/pref-connection.png
 -share/gnome/help/gabber/C/pref-mainwindow.png
 -share/gnome/help/gabber/C/pref-msg.png
 -share/gnome/help/gabber/C/pref-roster-statuscolors.png
 -share/gnome/help/gabber/C/pref-roster.png
 -share/gnome/help/gabber/C/userinfo-basic.png
 +share/gnome/help/gabber/C/userinfo-general.png
  share/gnome/help/gabber/C/userinfo-jud.png
  share/gnome/help/gabber/C/users-adduser.png
 +share/gnome/help/gabber/C/users-edituser-client.png
  share/gnome/help/gabber/C/users-edituser-groups-add.png
  share/gnome/help/gabber/C/users-edituser-groups.png
